title: Navy Tests Prototype Atmospheric Diving System
description: Naval Undersea Warfare Center Division hosted the first open water test of the Deep Sea Expeditionary with No Decompression suit in Liberty Bay, Wash.

body.text: Naval Undersea Warfare Center Division, Keyport, Washington, hosted the first open water test of the Deep Sea Expeditionary with No Decompression suit in Liberty Bay, Washington, June 8-12.

Navy Petty Officer 1st Class Andrew Turner conducts predive checks as Navy Petty Officer 2nd Class Giovanni Casteñeda prepares to test a Deep Sea Expeditionary with No Decompression suit during an exercise at Naval Undersea Warfare Center Division, Keyport, Wash., June 9, 2026.
